name: @fullcalendar-monorepos/standard
description: Full-sized drag & drop event calendar in JavaScript

scripts.demo:prepare: cp packages/vanilla/dist/all/global.js demo/fullcalendar.js && cp packages/vanilla/dist/themes/classic/global.js demo/fullcalendar-classic-theme.js && cp packages/vanilla/dist/skeleton.css demo/fullcalendar.css && cp packages/vanilla/dist/themes/classic/theme.css demo/fullcalendar-classic-theme.css && cp packages/vanilla/dist/themes/classic/palette.css demo/fullcalendar-classic-palette.css
scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
